marks_distribution: Unit I: Chemical Substances-Nature and Behaviour - 25 Marks
Unit II: World of Living - 25 Marks
Unit IV: Effects of Current - 13 Marks
question_paper_design: Typology of Questions: VSA (including objective type), Assertion-Reasoning, SA, LA, Source-based/Case-based/Passage-based/Integrated assessment questions.
bloom_levels: Demonstrate Knowledge and Understanding (State, name, list, identify, define, suggest, describe, outline, summarize)
Application of Knowledge/Concepts (Calculate, illustrate, show, adapt, explain, distinguish)
Formulate, Analyze, Evaluate and Create (Interpret, analyze, compare, contrast, examine, evaluate, discuss, construct)
practical_assessment: Assessment of Practical Skills in Science - Class X - CBSE Publication

List of Experiments includes: pH determination, properties of acids/bases, classification of reactions, reactivity series, Ohm's law graph, equivalent resistance, leaf peel mount, CO2 respiration, acetic acid properties, soap cleaning capacity, focal length determination, light path through glass slab, binary fission/budding observation, embryo identification.
project_assessment: Portfolio: Brief write-up on topics not assessed in year-end examination (Periodic Classification of Elements; Heredity and Evolution; Electric Effects of Electric Current).
Credit given for Periodic Assessment/Portfolio based on joyful and experiential opportunities.
